SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE value BETWEEN 5 AND 10;
SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE value BETWEEN 10 AND 15;
SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE value BETWEEN 1 AND 15;
SELECT (SELECT AVG(value) FROM numbers) BETWEEN 1 AND 10;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM numbers) BETWEEN 0 AND 4;
SELECT (SELECT MAX(value) FROM numbers) BETWEEN 1 AND 15;
SELECT n1.value FROM numbers n1 JOIN numbers n2 ON n1.value BETWEEN n2.value AND n2.value + 5;
SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE '2023-01-01' BETWEEN '2022-12-31' AND '2023-01-02';
SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE value >= 1 AND value <= 10;
SELECT CASE WHEN 7 BETWEEN 1 AND 10 THEN 'Within range' ELSE 'Out of range' END AS range_status;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM numbers WHERE value BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(value) FROM numbers) AND (SELECT MAX(value) FROM numbers);
SELECT AVG(value) FROM numbers WHERE value BETWEEN 1 AND 10;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE value BETWEEN 1 AND 10) AS subquery;
